prompt: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash fantasy painting on warm off-white rice paper, combining monumental calligraphy with a heroic figure scene. On the right side, a lone ancient warrior in ornate dark robes and layered black armor sits astride a large tiger on the edge of a jagged cliff, both shown in three-quarter back view facing left toward the open landscape. The warrior wears a flowing cape and long ribbon streamers whipping in the wind, and raises a straight sword vertically so that it becomes a brilliant pillar of golden-white light piercing upward into dense storm clouds. The tiger is powerfully built, realistic, alert, and richly detailed with bold stripes, white fur accents, and ceremonial cloth and tack with subtle gold ornament. The sky is filled with smoky gray ink clouds, softly blooming washes, and scattered gold flecks around the glowing sword beam. Below and to the left, a misty shanshui landscape opens into distant mountains, river water, tiny tree clusters, and layered atmospheric haze rendered in pale gray ink. On the left half of the composition, include 2 large vertical columns of expressive black brush-calligraphy in Chinese, bold and irregular, occupying most of the height; add 1 narrower vertical line of smaller calligraphy beside them and 4 red seal stamps total, with 2 small seals near the smaller inscription, 1 seal near the upper right edge, and 1 double-stacked red seal at the lower left. Emphasize high contrast between empty paper space and dark ink masses, literati painting aesthetics, sweeping brush energy, epic martial grandeur, and a subtle modern fantasy finish with restrained metallic gold highlights.
